title: Croatian Pineapple Skewers
description: A refreshing and citrusy Croatian dish featuring pineapple and ferment-jang, perfect for a light snack or dessert. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for all dietary needs.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, orange zest, and honey until well combined.
Add the pineapple chunks to the bowl and toss to coat with the citrus mixture.
Thread the pineapple chunks onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the coconut cream onto the pineapple chunks.
Sprinkle the toasted coconut flakes over the pineapple chunks.
Grill the skewers for 5 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned.
Serve the skewers warm, garnished with chopped fresh mint leaves and a dollop of ferment-jang.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
